work.name: Amazon Web Services
highlights: Brought up LLM model inferences on AWS Neuron accelerator, and optimized the inference system to achieve 8-9 times of the original throughput.
Analyzed performance bottlenecks and developed high-performance, resuable kernels to accelerate common computations across models.
Maintained the compilation stack tracing feature for quicker profiling and debugging.

work.name: AniML, Inc.
work.summary: Founding engineer, built end-to-end solutions for monocular camera 3D reconstruction.
highlights: Implemented CUDA algorithms for accelerating neural rendering and generative vision models.
Researched on combining neural rendering and 3D generative AI for high-fidelity object reconstruction.

work.name: Huawei Canada Inc.
work.summary: Noah's Ark Lab, supervised by Juwei Lu
highlights: Engineered on video understanding algorithms and created prototypes for AI video editing applications.
Maintained the automated pipeline for clustered model training and cloud deployment using Docker.
Used OpenCV and C++ to create test systems for hand tracking and action recognition.
Thesis: End-to-End Drone Systems for High Quality Indoor 3D Reconstruction and Measurements.
Focused on 3D computer vision and robotics.
